first_edition_canonical_record.title: The Painleve Handbook
first_edition_canonical_record.series: implicit (CRM Series in Mathematical Physics co-imprint)

second_edition_record.title: The Painleve Handbook
second_edition_record.ch7_title_2nd_ed: Discrete nonlinear equations (verified at fce68d9 CM-CH7-FINAL-ACQUISITION-PROBE)
second_edition_record.note: 2nd edition supersedes 1st in current practice + has expanded discrete-Painleve content. Operator-side ILL acquisition could target either edition; 2nd ed is stronger primary anchor for newer material.
second_edition_record.used_in_other_envelopes: T2-R5-LIT-HUNT-TRIANGULATION-086 V5 used the 2nd ed (per discrepancy_log D3 cross-reference)

candidate_chapters.ch5_painleve_property: Standard chapter on Painleve property; could plausibly host parameter-system definition
candidate_chapters.ch6_multiscale_or_methods: Multi-scale / asymptotic methods; less likely to host 4-tuple chart-map
candidate_chapters.ch7_discrete_painleve_or_algorithmic_tes: 1st ed exact title unverified by direct readback at fce68d9; 2nd ed ch7 = 'Discrete nonlinear equations' (less likely host for surface-type chart-map)

069r1_substrate_gap_target_chapter.justification: 069r1 handoff names CM2008 only as 'Conte-Musette 2008 review' without chapter pin. CM book is a Painleve-handbook genre review; the 4-tuple chart-map question is surface-type / Sakai D_6 / KNY 2017 territory which is not the Painleve-property + algorithmic-test focus of CM ch7.
069r1_substrate_gap_target_chapter.implication_for_069r2: CM2008 review is unlikely primary host for the explicit (a_0,a_1,a_2) -> (alpha_inf, alpha_0, beta_inf, beta_0) chart-map. May contain background on PIII parameter conventions but the surface-type / Sakai / KNY identification is post-CM2008 territory (Sakai 2001 + KNY 2017 are the canonical candidates for this question per JIMBO-MIWA-1981-II-ACQUISITION sub-finding).

halt_gate_authorship: PASS (R. Conte + M. Musette; no third author at 1st ed)

open_access.arxiv: NOT_AVAILABLE (book chapter; arXiv search returned 0 results in fce68d9)
open_access.author_website: NOT_FOUND (Conte ENS Paris-Saclay; Musette VUB Brussels; PDFs not posted at probe time)

library.primary_target_jp: Univ. of Tokyo library; Tokyo Inst. of Tech.; RIKEN libraries
library.secondary_target_jp: Yokohama City Univ. ILL via NDL Tokyo

open_access_companion_papers.note: CM-CH7-PROBE surfaced arXiv:2503.00834 (Conte-Musette-Ng-Wu 2025) and arXiv:1806.03177 (Conte-Musette 2018) as OA Painleve-test review companions but neither is the book chapter itself.

acquisition_recommendation: Already operator-side ILL-recommended per CM-CH7-FINAL-ACQUISITION-PROBE. 102 does NOT change recommendation. If 069r2 path-delta authorized, target both 1st ed ch5/ch6/ch7 AND 2nd ed (2020) ch7 'Discrete nonlinear equations' for complete coverage.

substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.069r1_substrate_gap_description: explicit (a_0, a_1, a_2) -> (alpha_inf, alpha_0, beta_inf, beta_0) chart-map for CT v1.3 sec 3.5 4-tuple = (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2)
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.expected_cm_filler_section: UNDETERMINED (069r1 does not pin chapter; book scope partly off-target relative to surface-type chart-map question)
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.prior_finding_substance: CM book focuses on Painleve property + algorithmic Painleve test + tau-function methodology; the surface-type / Sakai D_6 / 4-tuple parametrisation is the territory of Sakai 2001 + KNY 2017 which post-date and supersede CM2008 1st edition for this question.
substrate_gap_chapter_section_mapping.implication_for_069r2: Probability that CM2008 directly fills the chart-map gap = LOW. Probability that CM2008 contains background context (PIII parameter conventions, monodromy data) = MODERATE. Recommend acquisition only if Sakai 2001 + KNY 2017 paths are also exhausted.

supersession_note: Prior LANDED fire CONTE-MUSETTE-CH7-FINAL-ACQUISITION-PROBE (fce68d9) already executed bibliographic confirmation + 7-OA-route accessibility probe. 102 does NOT re-execute; 102 emits this resolution as pre-verification record citing prior fire + adds 2nd-edition disambiguation. Disposition: NO_HALT, scope reduced to citation + spot-confirm + edition disambiguation.
